title: Refractal
description: This shader adds focus blur, motion blur and liquid distortion
body:
#### Features:

- Focus blur (depth of field).
- Motion blur.
- Liquid (water and lava) distortion.
- Glow and glare around the sun.

---
 
![Looking at close objects blurs the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75776543bec1444696bef9c9eeb307291eada409.jpeg)

![Looking at far objects blurs close objects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c45acfecae6295921e76ba509e72a86ca111530.jpeg)

![Underwater distortion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/908b2bac2bf514e3ce99de7be744f4efcbb389f1.jpeg)
